message:
bd-3bxhj.2.4: TSX/JSX parser pipeline with typed AST and symbol table

Regex-based extraction of React/OpenTUI semantic structures:
- Component detection: function, arrow, class, forwardRef, memo
- Hook extraction with component association and custom hook definitions
- JSX element scanning with prop extraction (named, boolean, spread)
- Type/interface/enum extraction with field parsing
- Symbol table with import source tracking (named, default, namespace, aliased)
- Event handler detection (inline vs named) with component association
- Project-level parsing with cross-file symbol resolution
- Recoverable diagnostics for missing files and ambiguous patterns
- 30 unit tests covering all extraction paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
